title: Settings
sync.title: Cloud Sync
sync.statusLocal: Local only — vault data stays on this device
sync.statusSynced: Synced — vault data is encrypted and backed up
sync.enableModal.title: Enable Cloud Sync?
sync.enableModal.description: Your encrypted vault will be stored on the server. Only you can decrypt it with your master password.
sync.enableModal.zeroKnowledge: Zero-knowledge: server cannot read your data
sync.disableModal.title: Disable Cloud Sync?
sync.disableModal.description: Choose what happens to your vault data currently stored on the server.
sync.disableModal.deleteHint: Recommended — removes all vault data from cloud
sync.disableModal.keepHint: Data encrypted, server cannot read it. Quick re-enable later.
account.resetMessage: This will permanently delete all your vault data. This action cannot be undone.
export.title: Export Vault
export.description: Export your vault data to a file
export.jsonWarning: JSON exports are unencrypted. Handle with care.
export.csvWarning: CSV exports are unencrypted. Handle with care.
import.title: Import Passwords
health.title: Security Health
